PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?winner ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  VALUES ?tournament {
    wd:Q50113 wd:Q155691 wd:Q1659 wd:Q31250
  }
  ?event1 wdt:P527 ?tournament .
  ?event1 wdt:P1461 ?winner .
  ?event1 wdt:P585 ?time1 .
  ?event2 wdt:P527 ?tournament .
  ?event2 wdt:P1461 ?winner .
  ?event2 wdt:P585 ?time2 .
  ?event3 wdt:P527 ?tournament .
  ?event3 wdt:P1461 ?winner .
  ?event3 wdt:P585 ?time3 .
  BIND(YEAR(?time1) AS ?y1)
  BIND(YEAR(?time2) AS ?y2)
  BIND(YEAR(?time3) AS ?y3)
  FILTER(?y2 = ?y1 + 1)
  FILTER(?y3 = ?y2 + 1)
  ?winner wdt:P21 wd:Q6581097 .
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
}
